mysite
Table of Contents

Class ClienteDTO

Namespace
BLL.DTOs
Assembly
BLL.dll

Projection of a Cliente entity used across all BLL service boundaries.

public class ClienteDTO
Inheritance
object
ClienteDTO
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Combines core identity fields with hydrated membership details and a pre-computed balance so that consumers (UI managers, API controllers) never need to issue additional queries. Status defaults to Activo on construction.

Constructors

ClienteDTO() 

public ClienteDTO()

Properties

Apellido

Client's last name.

public string Apellido { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Balance

Current account balance in currency units (positive = credit, negative = debt).

public decimal Balance { get; set; }

Property Value

decimal

CreatedAt

Timestamp of record creation.

public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

DNI

Argentine national identity document number.

public int DNI { get; set; }

Property Value

int

Email

Contact email address.

public string Email { get; set; }

Property Value

string

EstadoBalance

Categorized balance state derived from Balance.

public EstadoBalance EstadoBalance { get; set; }

Property Value

EstadoBalance

FechaNacimiento

Date of birth.

public DateTime FechaNacimiento { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime

Id

Primary key of the client record.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

MembresiaDetalle

Hydrated membership details. Populated by ClienteService.ObtenerCliente when membership exists.

public MembresiaDTO MembresiaDetalle { get; set; }

Property Value

MembresiaDTO

MembresiaID

FK to the client's currently assigned membership, or null if none.

public Guid? MembresiaID { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid?

Nombre

Client's first name.

public string Nombre { get; set; }

Property Value

string

NombreCompleto

Concatenation of Nombre and Apellido.

public string NombreCompleto { get; }

Property Value

string

ProximaFechaPago

Next scheduled membership billing date, or null when no active membership row exists.

public DateTime? ProximaFechaPago { get; set; }

Property Value

DateTime?

Razon

Textual reason for the current Status. Populated when status is Inactivo.

public string Razon { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Status

Active/inactive status. Defaults to Activo.

public ClienteStatus Status { get; set; }

Property Value

ClienteStatus
